name: x2l4_inplace_twice
drl: rule SJ when $a : E0(tag == "z") $b : E0(this before[0ms,200ms] $a) then end
_finding: D-173 3-touch ORDER compound (mechanism CRACKED, fix VALIDATED in recon and REVERTED pending the Bryan gate — diff verbatim in docs/tjupd-ledger-mechanisms.md §5): the $b-refire's CHILDLIST move-to-end is a per-ACTION side effect (the model re-runs phase B each touch against the CURRENT children, its emission dedup notwithstanding), but the engine's replay attaches it to the ONE dedup'd RUpd op at the FIRST touch's stamp — a leading same-epoch tag-VI pins the refire pass before the entry exists and the entry's self-child never moves. Discriminated by the x2l1-vs-x2l2 minimal pair (drop the leading VI: engine goes green). NOT the identity-model law (no delete exists in the composition). Fix = the childlist re-adds ride the per-action RMove ops. || GRADUATED by the D-174 landing: the childlist re-adds ride the per-action RMove ops (⚖ the dedup/side-effect law — staged-op dedup folds emissions, not effects; ledger top). Mechanism D-173 / report §5.
